title: ActiveFence | Red Teaming
description: ActiveFence Guardrails monitors generative AI inputs and outputs in real-time. It enforces customizable policies across text, image, audio, and video, providing live visibility and intervening to prevent unsafe or misaligned behaviors with contextualized localization in 20+ languages.

items: Enforce role- & task-based access policies across agent populations & their tool access.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
Automate goal alignment audits, including adversarial review of long-term agent memory.
